title: olyra nana
intro: Olyra nana, also known as Dwarf Olyra, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Poaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Olyra nana include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce inflammation, and ease respiratory congestion. Herbal preparations of Olyra nana can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
